parsed_output.justification: The players' claims form a consistent narrative: Paul started as the Tanner, Mike was the Robber and stole Paul's card (becoming the Tanner), and Mitchell (the Troublemaker) then swapped Mike and Eric (the Insomniac). This means Eric ended the night as the Tanner and Mike ended as the Insomniac. With Justin claiming the Hunter role, all five players are accounted for as either Village-aligned or the Tanner, meaning the Werewolf cards must be in the center pool.
